arts.ttl: Report: Everton want to resign forward as David Moyes seeks attacking reinforcements
arts.sum: Everton are reportedly preparing to approach Tottenham Hotspur over a potential move for Richarlison, as they look to strengthen their attacking options for the upcoming season. The Brazilian forward has emerged as a surprise target for the Toffees, who are looking to bolster their squad ahead of their exciting move to their new stadium at […] The post Report: Everton want to resign forward as David Moyes seeks attacking reinforcements appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Napoli struggle in new deal for Andre-Frank Zambo Anguissa
arts.sum: Renowned transfer journalist Fabrizio Romano has reported on Thursday that the talks of a contract renewal between Napoli and André-Frank Zambo Anguissa have now hit an impasse. The Italian journalist…
